question_text: A person pushes a shopping trolley with a force of 50 N. What is the reaction force, according to Newton's Third Law?

options.label: A
options.text: 50 N in the same direction as the push

options.label: B
options.text: 50 N in the opposite direction, exerted by the trolley on the person

options.label: C
options.text: 0 N because the trolley is being pushed

options.label: D
options.text: More than 50 N in the opposite direction

explanation: Newton's Third Law states that forces always come in equal and opposite pairs. When the person pushes the trolley with 50 N, the trolley pushes back on the person with 50 N in the opposite direction.
